questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to MAC Sublayer?
options: Inefficient scaling of Carrier Sense Multiple Access (CSMA/CD) collisions.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of Carrier Sense Multiple Access (CSMA/CD) collisions.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how Carrier Sense Multiple Access (CSMA/CD) collisions scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
